name: Yoga Hands-Free VR
summary: Welcome to our immersive Yoga Hands-Free VR application, where you can enhance your practice like never before. A yoga-inspired VR learning experience using hand-tracking only, designed for comfort and natural motion. No controllers. Just you.  Learn Yoga with 3D tutors, nature scenes, slow motion, rewind & fast forward!  Introduce precision into your practice with our slow-motion feature. By touch the panda button, you can replay current pose in slow motion.
